case_title: EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC VS. JOAN LUNING GUAN et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOAN LUNING

DECLARATION ANDREW RUNDQUIST FILED RE: MEMORANDUM SUPPORTING COMPETENCY OF WITNESS TO TESTIFY TO THE CONTENTS OF THE PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (EVIDENCE CODE 1271) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-19-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE CALVARY SPC I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOAN LUNING

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOAN LUNING DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-29-2012
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOAN LUNING
DECLARATION ANDREW P. RUNDQUIST FILED RE: INTEREST, CCP 1033(B)(2), REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC
DECLARATION ERICKA LONG FILED RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION RE REDUCED FILING FEE & RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC
NOTICE OF HEARING AND ACCOMPANYING PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC SERVED DEC-05-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOAN LUNING
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUAN, JOAN LUNING $3,046.77 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,747.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
